overall.description: Static elevated view of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape at dusk from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The scene features a dense urban environment with towering glass skyscrapers, holographic billboards, industrial smoke stacks, and neon-lit streets viewed from a sheltered balcony position above a busy intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated balcony overlooking neon-lit city intersection

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cityscape from a sheltered elevated position, watching traffic flow and holographic advertisements cycling on the central billboard

entered.detail: distinctive cylindrical building with red neon trim and multiple levels
large rotating holographic display tower showing cycling advertisements above the plaza
tall industrial chimneys emitting dark smoke plumes into the sky
bright red vertical neon signage on the left edge of the frame
tall modern glass tower with illuminated windows rising on the right side
curved elevated roadway structure with vehicle lights visible
ground floor commercial spaces with bright neon lighting and signage

segments.scene_description: A stationary elevated view from a sheltered balcony overlooking a dense cyberpunk city intersection at dusk. The circular plaza building with red neon trim dominates the center, topped by a large holographic billboard displaying cycling advertisements. Industrial smokestacks rise in the background against a hazy overcast sky, while moderate traffic flows along the multi-lane streets below. Neon signs and illuminated windows punctuate the surrounding glass and steel skyscrapers, creating a vibrant neon atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary elevated perspective of a dense cyberpunk intersection as the dusk light settles over a futuristic urban landscape. It begins from a sheltered balcony overlooking a circular plaza building defined by red neon trim and a large, cycling holographic billboard. As the gaze extends outward, the view encompasses industrial smokestacks rising into a hazy overcast sky, contrasting with the vibrant glow of the city. The scene then settles on the multi-lane streets below where moderate traffic flows between towering glass and steel skyscrapers. Finally, the atmosphere is punctuated by a network of illuminated windows and neon signs that solidify the city's electric, high-tech mood.
